title: Handling string-> float coercions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE services (sid UInt8 NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, sname String NOT NULL DEFAULT '', sfee Float64 NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00);
INSERT INTO services (sid, sname, sfee) VALUES (2, 'Consulting', 2000.50);
INSERT INTO services (sid, sname, sfee) VALUES (3, 'Maintenance', 3000.00);
INSERT INTO services (sid, sname, sfee) VALUES (4, 'Support', 4000.00);
INSERT INTO services (sid, sname, sfee) VALUES (5, 'Training', 5000.00);
key_bug_features: String to float coercion in INSERT statements
